en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO THE DOVE ON FAR-OFF TEREBINTHS. A MIKTAM OF DAVID, WHEN THE PHILISTINES SEIZED HIM IN GATH. Be gracious to me, O God, for man tramples on me; all day long an attacker oppresses me;
zh: 神啊！求你恩待我，因為人要踐踏我； 他們終日攻擊我，迫害我。

en: my enemies trample on me all day long, for many attack me proudly.
zh: 我的仇敵終日踐踏我， 攻擊我的人很多。

en: When I am afraid, I put my trust in you.
zh: 至高者 啊！我懼怕的時候， 就要倚靠你。

en: In God, whose word I praise, in God I trust; I shall not be afraid. What can flesh do to me?
zh: 靠著 神，我要讚美他的話； 我倚靠 神，就必不懼怕， 人能把我怎麼樣呢？

en: All day long they injure my cause; all their thoughts are against me for evil.
zh: 他們終日歪曲我的話， 常常設計謀陷害我。

en: They stir up strife, they lurk; they watch my steps, as they have waited for my life.
zh: 他們聚集在一起，埋伏著， 窺探我的腳蹤， 等候要害我的性命。

en: For their crime will they escape? In wrath cast down the peoples, O God!
zh: 願他們因罪孽的緣故不能逃脫； 神啊！願你在怒中使這些人敗落。

en: You have kept count of my tossings; put my tears in your bottle. Are they not in your book?
zh: 我多次流離，你都數算； 你把我的眼淚裝在你的皮袋裡。 這不都記在你的冊子上嗎？

en: Then my enemies will turn back in the day when I call. This I know, that God is for me.
zh: 我呼求你的時候， 我的仇敵就都轉身退後； 因此我知道 神是幫助我的。

en: In God, whose word I praise, in the LORD, whose word I praise,
zh: 靠著 神，我要讚美他的話； 靠著耶和華，我要讚美他的話。

en: in God I trust; I shall not be afraid. What can man do to me?
zh: 我倚靠 神，就必不懼怕， 人能把我怎麼樣呢？

en: I must perform my vows to you, O God; I will render thank offerings to you.
zh: 神啊！我要償還我向你所許的願， 我要把感謝祭獻給你。

en: For you have delivered my soul from death, yes, my feet from falling, that I may walk before God in the light of life.
zh: 因為你救了我的性命脫離死亡； 你不是救了我的腳不跌倒， 使我在生命的光中，行在 神你的面前嗎？
